name: xenotransplant_religious_consent_crisis
premise: Cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Basil Moyo has one experimental gene-edited pig heart available under a compassionate-use protocol for a patient named Farid Hassan, who will likely die within days without a transplant. Farid is sedated after cardiac collapse, but before losing capacity he told his daughter that he feared violating his faith's dietary and bodily teachings if the organ came from a pig. His wife now insists he would have accepted any lifesaving option, while his adult son argues that implanting the heart would betray a religious boundary Farid tried to honor his whole life. The research sponsor wants a rapid answer because the organ cannot remain viable beyond tonight. No human donor heart is expected in time.

agents.name: Dr. Basil Moyo
agents.identity: I am a transplant surgeon trained to act while minutes still matter, not after family consensus magically appears. But experimental medicine becomes ethically thin if urgency allows me to reinterpret a patient's deepest commitments for him.
agents.goal: I want to offer Farid a chance to live without overriding what may have been a sincere religious refusal. I need to decide whether probable survival benefit outweighs ambiguity about his prior wishes.

agents.name: Layla Hassan
agents.identity: I am Farid's daughter and I know my father wrestled with faith seriously, not symbolically. He was afraid of dying, but he was also afraid of surviving in a way that felt like a betrayal of what he believed.
agents.goal: I want Dr. Moyo to decline the xenotransplant unless my father clearly consented to it, because bodily integrity and religious conviction should not be rewritten during crisis. I believe saving his life cannot justify guessing away his moral limits.

choices: I will proceed with the experimental pig-heart transplant because it is Farid's only realistic chance of survival and his family is divided on what he would have wanted.
I will decline the xenotransplant because Farid's prior religious hesitation makes it ethically wrong to assume consent for such an extraordinary intervention.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Dr. Basil Moyo must decide whether to implant the experimental pig heart. What does Dr. Basil Moyo do?
